subtopic: Types of Orders and Trading Strategies
title: Types of Orders and Trading Strategies: If a company sells a futures contract for crude oil...
summary: Calculate the profit or loss from a futures position based on entry and exit prices.
prompt: If a company sells a futures contract for crude oil at $70 per barrel and the price drops to $65, what is the profit or loss?

options.text: If the company sold the futures at $70 and the price dropped to $65, they
An options contract for downside protection

solution: If the company sold the futures at $70 and the price dropped to $65, they profit $5 per barrel since they locked in the higher price.
